response.justification: The candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) against a requirement of 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience, and no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle work. The candidate's strengths lie in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS systems — a substantial mismatch with the mandatory requirements of this role.
strengths: Strong overall software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Polyglot engineer with low-latency systems exposure (DLang at Sociomantic handling millions of req/s)
Demonstrated communication skills via talks, workshops, and teaching (Selenium course, Web Internals)
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience; far below the 5-10 year mandatory threshold
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No evidence of Windows-platform development or SQL Server/Oracle database work
